description_long: This is a plush stuffed toy modeled after Pikachu, a well-known character from the Pokémon franchise. The toy features a rounded yellow body with two large, pointed ears tipped in black, and a pair of wide, expressive eyes. Its cheeks are marked with bright red circles, and it has a small, smiling mouth. The back displays two brown horizontal stripes and a distinctive lightning bolt-shaped tail with a brown base. The toy's limbs are short and stubby, giving it a cute and approachable appearance. The surface appears soft and matte, typical of plush toys, and the overall build suggests it is lightweight and squeezable.
description: A soft, yellow Pikachu stuffed toy with black-tipped ears, red cheeks, and a lightning bolt-shaped tail. It has a rounded, plush body and a friendly, expressive face.
description_view_0: Front view showing Pikachu's face, red cheeks, black-tipped ears, and rounded belly.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the profile of the head, ear, and the thickness of the lightning bolt-shaped tail.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the brown stripes on the back and the full shape of the tail.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the profile of the face, ear, and the tail's attachment to the body.
attribute_facial_expression: The facial expression is friendly and neutral, with wide, open eyes and a small, subtle smile. The cheeks are round and red, giving a cheerful appearance.
attribute_pose_or_posture: Standing upright with both arms slightly extended outward and legs apart, head facing forward.
